checks.command: python3 hash check against P2 BUILD_LOCK_INPUT_MATRIX
checks.summary: No P2 locked file hash mismatches
No forbidden runtime reads or imports

validated_rules: artifact schema refs bind to the exact contracted schema path and schema hash
source_refs remain replay-bound to invalidation inputs
natural language layout is canonical semantic authority and structured records are index and validation skeleton only
carrier profile covers DESKTOP, TABLET, MOBILE, MOBILE_IOS, and MOBILE_MATERIAL
iOS and Material mobile constraints are explicit
containment hierarchy is multi-level and parent-child references resolve
height constraints preserve required information through access paths
width constraints wrap or stack unless a declared horizontal scroll exception applies
state placement covers approved interaction messages and presentation modes match approved decisions
z-axis layering is ordered and Material elevation intent is declared
Figma reconstruction metadata remains non-authoritative and cannot introduce write authority
layout package refs and trace refs resolve to approved upstream or local layout authority
